description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage painted in a vibrant red and white color scheme. The wings are straight and low-mounted, featuring bold red stripes and a smooth, glossy finish. The cockpit is positioned just behind the propeller, enclosed with a dark-tinted canopy, and appears to be designed for a single pilot. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all accented with red and white striping. The landing gear consists of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller nose wheel, all fixed and painted red. The propeller at the front is clearly visible, and the overall design suggests a light sport or aerobatic aircraft.
description: A small, red and white single-propeller airplane with a low-mounted wing, enclosed cockpit, and fixed tricycle landing gear. The design is sleek and sporty, with bold striping and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single propeller, nose cone, and symmetrical wing layout with red stripes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the low-mounted straight wing, cockpit canopy, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with conventional stabilizers and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the propeller, cockpit, and landing gear details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight, unswept wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark-tinted canopy.
